title: gladiolus dalenii
intro: Gladiolus dalenii, also known as the Red lily or Acacia lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, Gladiolus dalenii has been used in medicine due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Gladiolus dalenii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
